name: Bad Bunny
bio: Bad Bunny's catalog operates at elite streaming scale because his recordings dominate global Latin playlists while also crossing into mainstream pop consumption.
notable_for: Streaming-era scale in Latin music and unusually strong worldwide catalog demand.
career_highlight: Un Verano Sin Ti remains one of the strongest global streaming albums of the 2020s.

earnings.assumptions: Modeled from global Latin streaming scale, playlist dominance, songwriter participation, and high current catalog velocity.

ownership.master_owner: Label-distributed masters with major artist-side participation assumed
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears shared across Bad Bunny, producers, collaborators, and publishers
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No broad catalog sale adjustment is assumed
ownership.notes: High streaming concentration makes platform mix and contract terms especially important to the retained share.
